final:
module RefModule (
    input wire [7:0] D,
    input wire WE,
    input wire RE,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg [7:0] Q
);
    reg [7:0] obf_memory; // 8-bit storage

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
        if (WE && !RE) begin
            obf_memory <= D; // Write data to obf_memory
        end else if (!WE && RE) begin
            Q <= obf_memory; // Read data from obf_memory
        end
    end
endmodule
